source: Continuation plan — failed tasks retry + new features

features.name: Backtest engine — pure simulation logic (no API, no DB)
features.description: Create backend/app/backtest/engine.py with pure functions: simulate_trades(prices: list[float], profile: StrategyProfile) -> list[Trade]. Trade = dataclass(entry_idx, exit_idx, entry_price, exit_price, pnl_pct, reason). Apply RSI+MACD buy/sell logic bar-by-bar. No async, no DB, no API — pure Python.
features.scope: backend/app/backtest/engine.py — pure trade simulation from price list

features.name: Backtest result metrics — calculate from trade list
features.description: Add to backend/app/backtest/engine.py: backtest_metrics(trades: list[Trade], initial_capital: float) -> BacktestResult. BacktestResult has total_return, max_drawdown, sharpe_ratio, win_rate, profit_factor, equity_curve (list[float]). Pure function, no DB.

features.name: Backtest API endpoint — POST /api/v1/backtest/run
features.description: Add POST /api/v1/backtest/run endpoint: accepts asset_id, interval, lookback_days, profile_name. Loads price_bars from DB, calls simulate_trades + backtest_metrics, returns JSON. Add router to main.py.

features.name: Backtest View — frontend form + results
features.description: New BacktestView.vue: form (asset select, days, profile), submit button, results table (return, MDD, Sharpe, win rate), trade list. Add to router + nav. Use existing component patterns.

features.name: DCA engine — pure functions (no DB)
features.description: Create backend/app/portfolio/dca.py with pure functions: should_dca(current_price, entry_price, dca_level, config) -> bool. calculate_dca_buy(entry_price, quantity, buy_price, tranche_pct) -> dict with new_avg_price, new_quantity, cost. DCAConfig dataclass with max_levels, drop_trigger_pct, tranche_pcts.

features.name: Integrate sentiment score into recommendation scoring
features.description: Add sentiment_score (weight 0.08) as 10th signal in backend/app/recommendations/scoring.py. Read from sentiment module if available, default to 0 (neutral) if not. Positive sentiment boosts buy, negative boosts avoid.

features.name: Rich entry/exit decision context with signal breakdown
features.description: Create backend/app/portfolio/decision_context.py with build_decision_context(asset_id, indicators, recommendation, regime, protections) -> dict. Returns full signal breakdown: each indicator value, score component, protection checks, trailing params. Pure function.

features.name: Strategy Management View — full profile details + regime
features.description: New StrategyView.vue showing: all 3 profiles with params (table), current active profile highlighted, regime gauge, auto-switch status, trailing/slippage/DCA params. Read from /strategy/summary. Add to router + nav.

features.name: Expanded position cards with trailing/DCA/risk detail
features.description: Expand PortfolioView.vue position cards: show trailing SL price vs peak, trailing TP state, DCA level, unrealized PnL with slippage, entry signal breakdown. Use existing exit_context data.

features.name: Signal breakdown bars in Recommendations View
features.description: In RecommendationsView.vue, add expandable row per recommendation showing 9-signal breakdown: RSI bar, MACD bar, BB bar, ADX bar, StochRSI bar, price trend, volume, anomaly, volatility. Color-coded horizontal bars. Use signal_details from API.

features.name: Protection events timeline in Portfolio
features.description: Add collapsible section in PortfolioView showing last 20 protection events: type, reason, timestamp, expires_at. Color by type: red=stop_loss_guard, orange=daily_drawdown, purple=circuit_breaker, blue=cooldown.

features.name: Enhanced Performance View with MDD/Sharpe/PF charts
features.description: Enhance PerformanceView.vue: add risk metrics section (MDD gauge, Sharpe badge, Profit Factor, Win Rate donut). Pull from /portfolio/risk-metrics. Show alongside existing recommendation accuracy.

features.name: Min volume filter for portfolio entries
features.description: Add volume filter to portfolio entry checks: only allow buy if asset's avg 24h volume > configurable minimum (default: $100k for crypto, $1M for stocks). Check in protections.py using recent price_bars volume data.

features.name: Ingest 4h and 1d intervals alongside 1h
features.description: Extend ingestion to also fetch 4h and 1d candles from Binance/Yahoo. Add interval parameter to scheduler jobs. Store in same price_bars table with interval='4h'/'1d'. Enables multi-timeframe analysis with real data.

features.name: Portfolio equity curve history
features.description: Track portfolio equity value at each evaluation cycle. Store as list in portfolio metadata or a lightweight in-memory buffer. Expose via GET /portfolio/equity-curve returning [{timestamp, equity, drawdown_pct}]. Needed for MDD chart and backtest comparison.

features.name: Trade journal — human-readable trade history with context
features.description: Create GET /portfolio/journal endpoint returning completed trades with: entry/exit prices, hold time, PnL, entry signal (which indicators triggered), exit reason, regime at entry/exit, protection events during hold. Aggregate from positions + transactions.

features.name: Portfolio service integration tests
features.description: Add integration-style tests for portfolio evaluation cycle: mock DB with realistic positions, verify entry/exit decisions, DCA triggers, trailing updates, protection checks all work together. Test the full evaluate_portfolio flow.

features.name: Scoring regression tests with known outcomes
features.description: Add tests with hardcoded indicator values that should produce known recommendation types. Verify scoring is deterministic and produces expected candidate_buy/avoid/neutral for specific market conditions.

features.name: Anomaly detector unit tests for all detector types
features.description: Comprehensive tests for PriceSpikeDetector, VolumeSpikeDetector, RSIExtremeDetector, and SqueezeDetector. Test with edge cases: empty data, single bar, exactly-at-threshold, extreme values.
